ModUpdateData.ModUpdateDescription:
[b]EHSM Major Update 10 - Star Systems Update[/b]
EHSM has updated on Jan 28th, 2026!
This update has added 2 new preset scenarios, "Maelstrom" and "Solaris". The original preset has been designated as "Classic" and will still continue to be updated alongside the new presets. Classic players will not be able to experience the new gravitational mechanics or new celestial objects. See the "versions" section of the steam page for more info on version differences.
This update requires user action. The modlist requires updating. You can obtain the latest modlist on the collection page discussions page, by starting a new save and copying the config (make sure you start the right preset), or by joining the discord for the updated Modlist.txt file
Worlds created after the update date will have all relevant changes implemented by-default
If you need any help updating, join the discord and I will help guide you
Detailed Patch notes are available on the steam page or in the discord
https://discord.gg/yJJVrj6hcP
